3324750.name: r/nosleep: The Night Shift at Paradise Valley Pool
3324750.description:
r/nosleep: The Night Shift at Paradise Valley Pool

r/nosleep is a short horror game series with episodes inspired by and adapted from posts on the r/nosleep subreddit. Night Shift at Paradise Valley Pool episode is the story of a night shift pool maintenance worker and his bizarre experiences during his first day on the job.

Key features:

  • Photo-realistic graphics with VHS film aesthetic

  • A fresh setting revolving around a swimming pool complex

  • Thrilling plot and tense atmosphere interspersed with mini-games

  • Multiple endings based on the player's exploration and discoveries
